title: Uttarakhand Board Result 2026: 92.10% Pass In Class 10, Akshat Gopal Tops With 98.20% Marks
description: Uttarakhand Board Class 10 Exams 2026 Topper: In Class 10, a total of 1,12,266 students registered for the examination, of whom 1,00,373 cleared it, taking the overall pass percentage to 92.10.
